React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchData'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [fetchData, status]

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has an unnecessary dependency: 'router'. Either exclude it or remove the dependency array. Outer scope values like 'router' aren't valid dependencies because mutating them doesn't re-render the component.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [status]

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'handleConnect'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [provider, email, handleConnect]

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: '_router'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [session, callbackUrl, _router]

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'muted', 'onError', 'onReady', 'onStateChange', and 'volume'. Either include them or remove the dependency array. If 'onReady' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [isApiLoaded, videoId, isHost, onStateChange, volume, muted, onReady, onError]

fix.text: [isApiLoaded, videoId, isHost, onStateChange, volume, muted, onReady, onError]
